description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ocaml/opam2 Docker image with a before_script that runs sudo apt-get -y update and sudo apt-get -y install m4 pkg-config. Define a single build stage. Add six jobs named rotor-build-4.04, rotor-build-4.05, rotor-build-4.06, rotor-build-4.07, rotor-build-4.08 and rotor-build-4.09, each limited to the master branch, that run in the build stage and execute the exact commands: opam switch <version>, eval $(opam env), opam repo set-url default https://opam.ocaml.org/, opam update, and opam pin -y --kind=path add rotor .
